stories.title: Fix asyncio.get_event_loop() deprecation in copy_trader.py
stories.evidence: Both occurrences replaced with asyncio.get_running_loop(). 98 tests pass.

stories.title: Add backend/__main__.py entry point
stories.evidence: backend/__main__.py created. python -c 'import backend.__main__' succeeds. 98 tests pass.

stories.title: Wire update_calibration() into weather trade settlement
stories.evidence: _try_calibrate_weather() added to settlement.py. city:<key> stored in Signal.sources by weather_signals.py. Function wrapped in try/except, never raises. 98 tests pass.

stories.title: Replace SIMULATION_MODE bool with TradingMode enum (paper/testnet/live)
stories.evidence: TRADING_MODE: str = 'paper' added to config.py. SIMULATION_MODE kept as computed @property (TRADING_MODE != 'live'). PolymarketCLOB now takes mode='paper'|'testnet'|'live'. backward-compat simulation kwarg preserved. 98 tests pass.

stories.title: EIP-712 order signing for testnet and live modes
stories.evidence: _sign_order_eip712() added to PolymarketCLOB using eth_account encode_typed_data. ORDER_STRUCT_TYPES defined with Polymarket CTF Exchange fields. Chain ID and contract address derived from mode (137/mainnet, 80002/Amoy). 98 tests pass.

stories.title: Add trading_mode column to Trade model with schema migration
stories.evidence: trading_mode column added to Trade. paper_bankroll, paper_pnl, paper_trades, paper_wins added to BotState. ensure_schema() migrates all new columns. 98 tests pass.

stories.title: Runtime mode switching via Telegram /mode command
stories.evidence: /mode paper|testnet|live now calls on_mode_switch callback which updates settings.TRADING_MODE and clob.mode at runtime. /status shows mode with emoji (🟠/🟡/🔴). on_mode_switch wired in Orchestrator.start(). 98 tests pass.
